case_title: ALAN CORTES VS. DENISE CARTER et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-06-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES THE DEBT AND AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $180.00 ON SEPTEMBER 2, 2010 AND THE BALANCE OF $130.00 ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2011, FOR A TOTAL OF $310.00. IF NO APPEARANCE ON OCTOBER 6, 2011, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($25.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, NESTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($25.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, DENISE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT NESTOR LOPEZ. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CORTES, ALAN DBA CORTES TAX SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, DENISE LOPEZ, NESTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
